title: Night Thoughts
overview: Night Thoughts is the seventh studio album by English alternative rock band Suede. Produced by long-time collaborator Ed Buller, the album was released through Warner Music UK on 22 January 2016 to widespread critical acclaim. It was accompanied by a feature film, directed by Roger Sargent. During their 2016 tour the band performed from behind a screen on which Sargent's film was projected during the first half of their set.  When You Are Young -Outsiders -No Tomorrow - Pale Snow - I Don't Know How to Reach You - What I'm Trying to Tell You -Tightrope - Learning to Be - Like Kids - I Can't Give Her What She Wants - When You Were Young - The Fur and the Feathers
